category_sources: source_facts.description says Parser generator for C; official GitHub repository describes PackCC as a parser generator for C.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is packcc; official repository heading and README use PackCC/packcc.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, command usage, and PEG syntax documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/arithy/packcc, so repository was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a C parser generator; official README usage describes generating parser source from PEG input; source_facts.executables lists packcc CLI.
